news.title:
Nifty Auto index surged 7%, led by Ashok Leyland, Tata Motors, Eicher Motors, and others.
Crude price drop, stable production, and March auto sales boosted recovery from prior war-driven lows.
news.summary:
Nifty Auto index surged 7%, led by Ashok Leyland, Tata Motors, Eicher Motors, and others.
Crude price drop, stable production, and March auto sales boosted recovery from prior war-driven lows.

news.title:
Markets decline as Trump's Iran deadline looms; Nifty falls below 22,800, Sensex down 698 points, crude oil surges to $115.
Hindalco and Wipro gain on Nifty; broader markets see losses led by IndiGo, Eicher Motors, and Adani Enterprises.
news.summary:
Markets decline as Trump's Iran deadline looms; Nifty falls below 22,800, Sensex down 698 points, crude oil surges to $115.
Hindalco and Wipro gain on Nifty; broader markets see losses led by IndiGo, Eicher Motors, and Adani Enterprises.

news.title:
Eicher Motors, M&M, and Maruti Suzuki shares rose up to 4% post-March sales results.
NSE advance-decline ratio noted at 12:1, reflecting positive market sentiment.
news.summary:
Eicher Motors, M&M, and Maruti Suzuki shares rose up to 4% post-March sales results.
NSE advance-decline ratio noted at 12:1, reflecting positive market sentiment.

news.title:
Eicher Motors' VECV reports 10% YoY rise in total sales at 13,311 units.
Sales grew compared to 12,094 units in the same period last year.
news.summary:
Eicher Motors' VECV reports 10% YoY rise in total sales at 13,311 units.
Sales grew compared to 12,094 units in the same period last year.

news.title:
VECV sold 13,311 units in March, up 10.1% YoY; YTD sales rose 14.8%.
Domestic sales grew 13.6% in March, exports dropped 38.8%; smaller trucks grew, buses declined.
news.summary:
VECV sold 13,311 units in March, up 10.1% YoY; YTD sales rose 14.8%.
Domestic sales grew 13.6% in March, exports dropped 38.8%; smaller trucks grew, buses declined.

news.title:
Eicher Motors' March CV sales rose 10% YoY to 13,311 units.
Sales slightly exceeded estimates of 13,300 units by 0.1%.
news.summary:
Eicher Motors' March CV sales rose 10% YoY to 13,311 units.
Sales slightly exceeded estimates of 13,300 units by 0.1%.

news.title:
Elara Capital identifies 20 stocks with upside potential after market correction due to geopolitical tensions.
Key picks include Maruti Suzuki, Eicher Motors, NTPC, HDFC Bank, and Apollo Hospitals, citing valuation comfort and growth visibility.
news.summary:
Elara Capital identifies 20 stocks with upside potential after market correction due to geopolitical tensions.
Key picks include Maruti Suzuki, Eicher Motors, NTPC, HDFC Bank, and Apollo Hospitals, citing valuation comfort and growth visibility.

news.title:
Eicher Motors' CV sales rose 10% YoY in March; domestic sales grew 13.6%.
Q3 FY26 net profit increased 21.4% YoY to Rs 1,420.6 crore; revenue rose 22.9%.
news.summary:
Eicher Motors' CV sales rose 10% YoY in March; domestic sales grew 13.6%.
Q3 FY26 net profit increased 21.4% YoY to Rs 1,420.6 crore; revenue rose 22.9%.

news.title: Eicher Motors faces a downgrade to Neutral by MOSL despite strong 350cc demand.
news.summary: Eicher Motors faces a downgrade to Neutral by MOSL despite strong 350cc demand.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal upgrades Eicher Motors to 'neutral' with a target of ₹6,960, implying a 2% upside.
Gas shortages, export challenges, and geopolitical risks may impact Eicher Motors' production and growth.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal upgrades Eicher Motors to 'neutral' with a target of ₹6,960, implying a 2% upside.
Gas shortages, export challenges, and geopolitical risks may impact Eicher Motors' production and growth.

news.title:
Brokerages spotlight HDFC Bank, Jubilant FoodWorks, Eicher Motors, and ONGC. HDFC Bank garners 'Buy' ratings for strong ROE and valuations.
Eicher Motors upgraded to 'Neutral,' ONGC retains 'Overweight,' and Jubilant faces LPG challenges. RBI forex cap may hit large banks' Q4 earnings.
news.summary:
Brokerages spotlight HDFC Bank, Jubilant FoodWorks, Eicher Motors, and ONGC. HDFC Bank garners 'Buy' ratings for strong ROE and valuations.
Eicher Motors upgraded to 'Neutral,' ONGC retains 'Overweight,' and Jubilant faces LPG challenges. RBI forex cap may hit large banks' Q4 earnings.

news.title:
Volvo Eicher plans 2% price hike from April due to rising steel costs.
Exports to Gulf impacted by conflict, but domestic demand offsets losses.
news.summary:
Volvo Eicher plans 2% price hike from April due to rising steel costs.
Exports to Gulf impacted by conflict, but domestic demand offsets losses.

news.title:
Nifty Auto index dropped 3% due to West Asia tensions; stocks like M&M, Maruti, Eicher, Tata Motors led declines.
Natural gas supply fears, crude above $100/barrel, and rising costs pose operational risks to auto manufacturers.
news.summary:
Nifty Auto index dropped 3% due to West Asia tensions; stocks like M&M, Maruti, Eicher, Tata Motors led declines.
Natural gas supply fears, crude above $100/barrel, and rising costs pose operational risks to auto manufacturers.

news.title:
Eicher Motors' subsidiary VE Commercial Vehicles appoints B Srinivas as MD & CEO, effective April 1, 2026.
Vinod Aggarwal transitions to Chairman role at VECV, marking leadership change after 16 years.
news.summary:
Eicher Motors' subsidiary VE Commercial Vehicles appoints B Srinivas as MD & CEO, effective April 1, 2026.
Vinod Aggarwal transitions to Chairman role at VECV, marking leadership change after 16 years.

news.title:
Two-wheeler sales up 35% in Feb 2026, aided by GST cut and better demand.
Hero MotoCorp leads with 45% growth; Suzuki Motorcycle volumes rise 38%, Royal Enfield expands capacity.
news.summary:
Two-wheeler sales up 35% in Feb 2026, aided by GST cut and better demand.
Hero MotoCorp leads with 45% growth; Suzuki Motorcycle volumes rise 38%, Royal Enfield expands capacity.

news.title:
Eicher Motors' Royal Enfield sold 100,905 units in Feb'26, up 11% YoY.
Domestic sales grew 13%, exports fell 2%, with YTD sales up 24% to 11.26L units.
news.summary:
Eicher Motors' Royal Enfield sold 100,905 units in Feb'26, up 11% YoY.
Domestic sales grew 13%, exports fell 2%, with YTD sales up 24% to 11.26L units.

news.title:
Eicher Motors' trucks & buses volumes rose 23.5% YoY in Feb '26.
Domestic trucks grew 41.3%, SCV grew 54.1%, buses declined 21.4%; exports up 8.9% YoY.
news.summary:
Eicher Motors' trucks & buses volumes rose 23.5% YoY in Feb '26.
Domestic trucks grew 41.3%, SCV grew 54.1%, buses declined 21.4%; exports up 8.9% YoY.

news.title:
Eicher Motors reported Feb'26 VECV sales at 9,986 units, up 23.4% YoY.
YTD sales for VECV reached 90,184 units, marking a 15.5% annual growth.
news.summary:
Eicher Motors reported Feb'26 VECV sales at 9,986 units, up 23.4% YoY.
YTD sales for VECV reached 90,184 units, marking a 15.5% annual growth.

news.title: Goldman Sachs raises Eicher Motors' target price to ₹9,200.
news.summary: Goldman Sachs raises Eicher Motors' target price to ₹9,200.

news.title:
Eicher Motors Q3 FY26 revenue rose 23% YoY to INR 6,114 cr; PAT up 21%.
Board approved INR 958 cr capex for Cheyyar plant, doubling capacity to 20L units/year.
news.summary:
Eicher Motors Q3 FY26 revenue rose 23% YoY to INR 6,114 cr; PAT up 21%.
Board approved INR 958 cr capex for Cheyyar plant, doubling capacity to 20L units/year.
